verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In shady green pastures, so rich and sweet, God leads His dear children along; Where the water's cool flow Bathes the weary one's feet, God leads His dear children along.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some thro' the waters, Some thro' the flood, Some thro' the fire, But all thro' the blood; Some thro' great sorrow, But God gives a song; In the night season And all the day long.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes on the mount Where the sun shines so bright, God leads His dear children along; Sometimes in the valley In the darkest of night, God leads His dear children along.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tho' sorrows befall us, And Satan oppose, God leads His dear children along; Through grace we can conquer, Defeat all our foes, God leads His dear children along.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Away from the mire, And away from the clay, God leads His dear children along; Away up in glory, eternity's day. God leads His dear children along.
